subcodes.title: Words to Miss E. Goodall, Kheirallah et al in March 1899
subcodes.first_line: Yes, everything was created in pairs but this earth is the flaming sword and sometimes even if affinities do meet they are not happy for various reasons
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
